subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Abhá Kingdom, and ye Hands of the Cause of God! Now is the time to hold fast unto the firm cord and to turn wholly towards the manifest horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی و ایادی امرالله الیوم وقت تمسک بحبل متین و توجه بافق مبین
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
